ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency with the ethical Temple Priest character but may lack naturalness in its precision. Overall quality seems good as it attempts to balance all aspects.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>The response is consistent with the persona and maintains a formal tone, but lacks context relevance due to not addressing immediate needs or concerns directly related to the scenario.

The response maintains a high level of persona consistency and naturalness, but could improve slightly on context relevance by acknowledging the specific situation more directly. Overall quality is good with minor room for improvement in all aspects to enhance immersion further.
